zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian de Wath於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾沃斯 武朋 迪亞爾時，她的父親Robert de Wath27歲，母親Mrs. Robert Wath27歲。她於大約1216年與Sir Roger Stapleton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1280年9月20日在英國越可爾享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian de Wath于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰越可爾沃斯 武朋 迪亞爾时，她的父亲Robert de Wath27岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Wath27岁。她于大约1216年与Sir Roger Stapleton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1280年9月20日在英国越可爾享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Waithe
meanings: either a topographic name from Old Norse vath ‘ford’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Waithe (Lincolnshire) and Wath (North and Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Julian de Wath was born about 1200, in Wath upon Dearne, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Wath, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Wath, was 27. She married Sir Roger Stapleton about 1216. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 20 September 1280, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 81.

Elle a épousé Sir Roger Stapleton environ 1216. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1280, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julian de Wath um 1200 in Wath upon Dearne, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Wath 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Wath 27. Sie hat um 1216 Sir Roger Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 20. September 1280 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

ko.Wath-upon-Dearne, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓h 업 디른
ko.lifeSummary: Julian de Wath(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓h 업 디른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Wath(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Wath(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1216년 Sir Roger Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 9월 20일 영국 요르크실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Stapleton aproximadamente 1216. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1280, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian de Wath родилась около 1200 г. в местности ват упон дирн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Wath было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Wath, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Stapleton около 1216 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 20 сентября 1280 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.
